title: Corallodiscus cooperi

The Gesneriaceae family is part of the order Lamiales, which includes a wide variety of flowering plants. The order Lamiales is further classified under the subclass Asteridae, which is a subclass of the class Magnoliopsida. The Magnoliopsida class is a group of flowering plants that also includes the classes Dilleniopsida and Magnoliopsida.
